name: Dogmatika Maximus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>教導の大神祇官</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マクシムス・ドラグマ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can banish 1 Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can activate this effect; send 2 monsters with different names from your Extra Deck to the GY, also your opponent sends 2 monsters from their Extra Deck to the GY, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Dogmatika Maximus" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can banish 1 Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can activate this effect; send 2 monsters with different names from your Extra Deck to the GY, also your opponent sends 2 monsters from their Extra Deck to the GY, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Dogmatika Maximus" once per turn.
eff: You can banish 1 Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can activate this effect; send 2 monsters with different names from your Extra Deck to the GY, also your opponent sends 2 monsters from their Extra Deck to the GY, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Dogmatika Maximus" once per turn.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

jp_sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

action: Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's Extra Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Prevents the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
